allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} in %{time_total}s\\n" --max-time 10 https://github.com 2>&1; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} in %{time_total}s\\n" --max-time 10 https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json 2>&1)
Bash(cd /workspaces/GeekVault/src/web && npm install -D vitest @vitest/coverage-v8 jsdom 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(cd /workspaces/GeekVault && python3 -c "
import yaml, sys
files = ['.github/workflows/ci-backend.yml', '.github/workflows/ci-frontend.yml', '.github/workflows/release.yml']
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fh:
            yaml.safe_load\(fh\)
        print\(f'{f}: valid YAML'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'{f}: INVALID - {e}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)
")

Bash(cd /workspaces/GeekVault/src/api/GeekVault.Api.Tests && dotnet test -c Release /p:CollectCoverage=true /p:CoverletOutputFormat=cobertura /p:CoverletOutput=./coverage/ 2>&1 | grep -E "\(Module|GeekVault|Total|Average|\\+\)" | head -20)

Bash(cd /workspaces/GeekVault/src/api/GeekVault.Api.Tests && dotnet test -c Release /p:CollectCoverage=true /p:CoverletOutputFormat=cobertura /p:CoverletOutput=./coverage/ '/p:ExcludeByFile=**/Migrations/*.cs' 2>&1 | grep -E "\(Module|GeekVault\\.Api |Total|Average|\\+---\)" | head -15)
